title: Monday Specialist
excerpt: Hi all. I’m looking for Monday specialist that is based in Malaysia. He will need to proficient in building out boards, automations and running projects within Monday.com.

posts.author: AlvinKan (Alvin Kan)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi all. I’m looking for Monday specialist that is based in Malaysia. He will need to proficient in building out boards, automations and running projects within Monday.com.

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @AlvinKan ,

Welcome to the monday community forums!

Although we are not based in Malaysia, our team at thespelas.com has extensive experience using monday for many a year, and we have worked with companies from most industries from all over the world, including from the Asia-Pacific region.

We have extensive experience in creating custom solutions, time-saving automations and running complex projects in monday.

We would be very happy if you scheduled a meeting here so you can better share your vision with us. Otherwise, if it is imperative for you to find someone based in Malaysia, I would suggest also posting in some highly frequented professional communities ( such as LinkedIn) beyond this one .

I hope our services can be of use to you!

Best regards,
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
